nasb.text: And this is love, that we walk according to His commandments. This is the commandment, just as you have heard from the beginning, that you should walk in it.

esv.text: And this is love, that we walk according to his commandments; this is the commandment, just as you have heard from the beginning, so that you should walk in it.

cnv.text: 我們要照著他的命令行事，這就是愛。你們從起初所聽見的那命令，就是要你們憑著愛心行事。

ccb.text: 爱就是遵行上帝的命令，这是你们从起初就听过又当遵行的命令。

csbs.text: 我们要按照他的命令行事，这就是爱；你们要照着你们从起初所听见的在其中行事，这就是命令。
